pageText: Custom embroidery, patches, name tapes and apparel services for wardrobe, props, theater and events.

items.title: Name Tapes
items.body: Clean, durable, production-ready embroidered name tapes.

items.title: Custom Patches
items.body: Embroidered patches for costumes, uniforms, props and departments.

items.title: Logo Embroidery
items.body: Professional embroidery for jackets, shirts, polos and setwear.

items.title: Headwear
items.body: Hats, beanies and crew caps embroidered to complete the look.

items.title: Bulk Production Runs
items.body: Reliable repeat production for wardrobe departments and events.

items.title: Theater Wardrobe
items.body: Custom embroidery for stage uniforms, costumes and crew apparel.
